case_title: TENZING SHERPA VS. SAN FRANCISCO FIRE DEPT ET AL

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-13-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Dismissal
